title: Yossi Matias on the golden age of research
summary: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, discusses the "magic cycle" connecting research breakthroughs to real-world impact. The conversation covers AI tools for scientific discovery, research infrastructure, and recent advances including flood forecasting, MedGemma, Gemini for Science, speculative decoding, generative UI, and quantum computing achievements like the Willow chip.
writeup: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, frames a "magic cycle" that links research breakthroughs to real-world impact. The conversation covers AI tools for scientific discovery, research infrastructure, and specific advances: flood forecasting, MedGemma, Gemini for Science, speculative decoding, and generative UI. It also addresses quantum computing, including the Willow chip. The discussion situates these results within ongoing themes of AI research automation and test-time compute.
